title: peristrophe purpurea
intro: Peristrophe purpurea, also known as the purple peristrophe, is a flowering plant species in the Acanthaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Peristrophe purpurea is often prepared in herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
